free_text: - Some of the 4He results
published with emphasis on the astrophysical aspects
of the reaction
Erratum.
Cross sections and analyzing powers for the (p(pol),n)
reaction on 3He and 4He at 200 MeV.
NE102 plastic scintillators.
Relative detector efficiency determined by by
normalized measured yields at 100, 147, and 200 MeV
to published cross sections at similar energies.
Neutron energy calibrated using well-known states in
12N and 13N.
Corrected for background due to reactions in Havar
windows of target cells.
Statistical uncertainty given.
Systematic uncertainty about 8%, primarily due to
uncertainties in neutron detector efficiency and areal
density.
At 0 degrees there is an additional estimated
systematic uncertainty of 5-10% due to background
subtraction difficulties.
Data received by email from C.Riedel,13/10/2000
Approved by C. Riedel, 18 June 2001.
VM
Updated as per C. Riedel comments.
SD: Titles of columns in DATA section
corrected in Subents 2,3.
Gas target at about 77 K and 7 atm.  Areal density
typically about 12 mg/cm2 (but only 5.8 mg/cm2 at 0
degrees)
SD: E-EXC -> E-RL in DATA section and
(E-RL,P+P+P) under EN-SEC added.
Average polarization about 0.73.
Gas target at about 77 K and 7 atm.  Areal density
typically about 12 mg/cm2 (but only 5.8 mg/cm2 at 0
degrees)
SD: E-EXC -> E-RL in DATA section and
(E-RL,P+P+P) under EN-SEC added.
Gas target at about 77 K and 7 atm.  Areal density
typically about 18 mg/cm2.
Average polarization about 0.73.
Gas target at about 77 K and 7 atm.  Areal density
typically about 18 mg/cm2.
